title: vicia benthamiana
intro: Vicia benthamiana, also known as the bentham's vetch or bentham's vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vicia benthamiana include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Vicia benthamiana typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
